skills.name: chemical-structure-annotation-repair
skills.description: Identify and correct inconsistencies between chemical structure annotations (SMILES, InChI, InChIKey) and associated metadata (parent mass, adduct, precursor m/z, compound name) in mass spectrometry spectral libraries. This skill repairs annotation errors that would otherwise cause valid spectra to be discarded during library curation.

skills.name: mass-spectral-library-curation
skills.description: Systematically repair and validate metadata, chemical structure annotations, and fragmentation data in public mass spectral libraries using a modular pipeline of harmonization, repair, and filtering steps. This skill reduces false annotations and improves library quality for downstream spectral matching and analogue searching.
